title: Foraging for wild foods
summary: Michigan-specific rules and safety guidance for harvesting wild foods on public lands, including personal-use limits and harvest restrictions.

title: Michigan Flora
summary: Michigan-specific plant reference with searchable species information, distribution maps, and identification support.

title: MushroomExpert.Com
summary: Deep North American mushroom reference with extensive species pages and practical identification information.

title: Wild Mushrooms
summary: Chef-focused mushroom hub with species pages, harvesting notes, identification pointers, and cooking ideas.

title: Edible Wild Plants and Mushrooms
summary: Large recipe and guide collection for edible wild plants and mushrooms, with harvesting, storage, and cooking help.

title: Foraged Food Recipes
summary: Recipe-focused page for turning wild-harvested flowers, mushrooms, herbs, berries, roots, and greens into usable food.

title: Ramps: How to Forage & Eat Wild Leeks
summary: Species-specific guide to finding, harvesting, storing, and cooking ramps, with sustainability notes and recipes.

title: Chanterelle Mushrooms: Foraging and Eating
summary: Species-specific chanterelle guide covering identification, look-alikes, habitat, harvest, cleaning, storage, and recipes.

title: Foraging: A How-To Guide to Get Started
summary: Broad beginner guide covering how to start foraging, safety, contaminants, legality, and building confidence.

title: 5 Rules of Foraging podcast episode
summary: Podcast episode centered on the basic rules of safe, ethical foraging. Good background listening, but not a substitute for species-level references.
